title: pilosocereus tehuacanus
intro: Pilosocereus tehuacanus, also known as the 'Tejocote Cactus', is a species of columnar cactus native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosocereus tehuacanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
